surfaceMix.note: 18 comments logged this period — 3x profile view multiplier active
8 posts · 6,115 impressions · Genius Home / Anthropic Claude post top performer at 4K impressions · 43 engagements

contentEngagement.detail: Premium custom button + visits to links in all posts (4 visits + 20 custom button engagements)
Genius Home / Anthropic Claude smart home data dashboard post · 43 engagements

insights.title: Post impressions +145.8% WoW — strongest week on record this snapshot series.
insights.body: 6,115 impressions this week vs. 1,915 last week. This is the third consecutive week of double-digit growth and the first to crack the 4-figure single-post threshold. The Genius Home / Anthropic Claude smart home dashboard post is the clear driver at 4,000+ impressions and 43 engagements. This post combined a relatable hook ('This isn't Smart Home. This is Genius Home.') with a practical AI demonstration — exactly the hybrid format recommended in last week's insight #5. The recommendation worked. 8 posts this week is above sustainable cadence — watch for engagement rate dilution across lower-performing posts.

insights.title: Profile viewers rebounded sharply to 581 (+91.2% vs prior 7d) — impression surge converted.
insights.body: Last week's divergence (impressions up, profile views down) has corrected. The 91.2% week-over-week increase in profile views confirms the Genius Home post drove real click-through behavior. New viewers this snapshot include a mix of 1st-degree low-voltage and security industry contacts (Romelio Chirino RCDD, Jefferson Jimenez RCDD, Robert Belleville) alongside new anonymous inbounds from Convergint. Christopher Longoria (Technology Director, RCDD, CTS) at 12h ago is the highest-signal named view this snapshot — RCDD + Director title + 1st degree is a strong combination.

insights.title: 19 recruiter views banner — Insight Global named, KPG99 INC cycle complete.
insights.body: The recruiter banner incremented by 1 to 19 total, with Insight Global now named. KPG99 INC from last week is no longer named in the visible viewer list, suggesting their view has cycled out of the 90-day display window or was replaced. Insight Global is a large staffing and IT services firm — their appearance may indicate active search for telecom, AV, or physical security design roles. 18+ remain anonymous. Consistent recruiter banner growth across three consecutive weeks validates that keyword positioning (RCDD, telecom, physical security, AI) is indexing effectively in Recruiter Lite.

insights.title: Three RCDD credentialed peer views this snapshot — Christopher Longoria, Jefferson Jimenez, Romelio Chirino.
insights.body: This is an unusually high RCDD peer concentration in a single snapshot. Christopher Longoria (Technology Director, RCDD, CTS · 1st) at 12h is most recent. Jefferson Jimenez (RCDD, Senior Engineer · 1st) and Romelio Chirino (RCDD, USMC Veteran, Low Voltage Designer · 1st) both at 2d. Three credentialed peers in one week — all 1st degree — suggests the Genius Home / AI content is resonating within the BICSI and low-voltage design community specifically. This peer signal is more valuable than anonymous views for professional reputation tracking.

insights.title: Genius Home post validated the hybrid format hypothesis — 4K impressions confirms the model.
insights.body: The structured recommendation from last week's insight #5 was: 'lead with a relatable moment, then reveal the tool or output.' The Genius Home post executed exactly that — 'This isn't Smart Home. This is Genius Home.' as the hook, followed by a concrete Anthropic Claude demonstration (cost calculation, battery monitoring, automations). Result: 4,000+ impressions and 43 engagements, the top-performing post in this snapshot series to date. Members reached jumped from 772 to 3,017 — a 290% increase driven primarily by this single post. This format should be the template for all future AI + practical application posts.

insights.title: Premium decision point: ~July 19. Case is now significantly stronger.
insights.body: Insight Global recruiter named, three RCDD peer views, Christopher Longoria (Technology Director) inbound, and a 290% jump in members reached — all in one week. The Genius Home post demonstrates that AI-adjacent content about practical home and infrastructure applications is your highest-reach content category. Two consecutive weeks of 60%+ impression growth followed by a 145.8% week is compounding momentum. At $30/mo, Premium has now surfaced a Director-level RCDD, two additional RCDD peers, a national staffing firm recruiter, and 3,017 unique members reached in a single week. If Christopher Longoria or Insight Global initiates contact before July 19, Premium has paid for itself many times over. Renew.
